ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the metrics belong */,
  "forum_avg_count" REAL /* Average count of forum posts made by the user */,
  "video_avg_count" REAL /* Average count of videos viewed by the user */,
  "watched_time_weekday" REAL /* Total time watched on weekdays */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "forum_participation_score" REAL /* Score based on the quality and quantity of forum posts */,
  "video_completion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of videos completed by the user */,
  "time_spent_weekend" REAL /* Total time spent on the platform during weekends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the video */,
  "video_stop_backward_seek_avg" REAL /* Average backward seek time during video playback */,
  "video_stop_backward_seek_sum" REAL /* Total backward seeks across all videos */,
  "watched_time_hour" REAL /* Total time watched in hours */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the resources table */,
  "video_pause_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the video was paused */,
  "video_speed_changes" INTEGER /* Number of times the video speed was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_interactions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_interactions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "final_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose score is recorded */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score achieved by the user */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Letter grade corresponding to the final score */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table (instructor who graded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_scores_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_scores_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table (instructor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_courses" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the user is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's enrollment (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the forum post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., question, answer, comment) */,
  "post_length" INTEGER /* Length of the post in characters */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the resource is linked */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., video, document, quiz) */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_size" REAL /* Size of the resource in MB */,
  "resource_duration" REAL /* Duration of the resource in minutes (for videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, resource view) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the resources table */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the feedback relates */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the resources table */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., general, technical, content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assignment, update, reminder) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
